title: Greenlight ADR 0005 (money-formatting consolidation, 11 pts) this release?
description: ADR 0005 has been Proposed for one full cycle without execution. It is a pure consolidation/adoption of already-built primitives (ADR 0002–0004), not new design. Drift is now accumulating: v0.7.0's new LedgerExplorer UI was wired to the un-normalized USD-only formatter, so the user-facing 'display == stored' guarantee remains unrealized and the gap widens each release. This is a prioritization decision (business judgment), not an architectural one — the path is settled. Approving routes the 11-pt plan to the delivery engineer via architecture.analysis.completed.

title: Merge ADR-0005 money-kernel consolidation (commit ea3641d) to remote?
description: ADR-0005 is implemented on main as commit ea3641d (16 files, +650/-346): shared src/lib/money kernel, formatMoney adopted app-wide via kernel-backed wrappers, WealthScoreCard compact helper, and an ESLint render-layer guardrail. Full gate is green — tsc clean, npm test 95/95, `eslint .` clean. Under review_each_pr autonomy the change is committed but UNPUSHED, awaiting human approval before it ships to remote / merges. This is the merge-approval decision. Separately, a 4th un-normalized money path (src/components/CategorizePanel.tsx) was discovered outside ADR-0005's scope and needs its own backlog item.

title: Security triage — ai-bookkeeper @ ea3641d (1 High, 2 Medium, 1 Low)
description: New scan findings requiring remediation decisions. H1 (postcss CVE) is a standing item now on its 5th scan; M1/M2 are new with the first API route. Approve to track for fix, or reject if accepted as risk.

title: Approve v0.8.0 README doc edits (working-tree, uncommitted)
description: Synced README to the ADR-0005 money-kernel release. 3 doc-only, in-place edits to README.md (code untouched; git status shows only README.md): (1) added 'money/' to the src/lib/ structure tree + annotated format.ts as kernel-backed wrappers; (2) marked features/ledger/lib round/arithmetic/format as re-export shims → @/lib/money in the enumeration; (3) extended the money-arithmetic Features bullet with the app-wide no-drift guarantee. CHANGELOG [0.8.0] + release note were already accurate (no edit). These are working-tree changes awaiting commit.
